name: Bus Tire Excise Tax Exemption

eligibility.description: The tires must be for a 'qualified bus,' which includes school buses or intercity buses with at least 20-adult seating capacity or regular scheduled routes.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts the sale of tires from excise tax if they are sold for use on intercity, local, or school buses.
